entry.em: ..EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 8 PM CDT FRIDAY

entry.data:
SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 108 IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 107 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
